_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in communicating AI and/or machine learning solutions to a wide range of audiences.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive audiences, communicating capability, limitations, and path to production.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-019 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.633), DG-S-001 (DG, cosine: 0.622).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.681). Shared vocabulary: [ai, audiences, communicating, skill]. DCWF-only terms [learning, machine, range, solutions, wide] vs WIDAI-only terms [building, capability, concept, demonstrations, executive, limitations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.895 (P=0.901, R=0.889). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in communicating AI and/or machine learning solutions to a wide range of a" and "Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.648 ≈ STS 0.681 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, audiences, communicating, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 32.0%. Shared tokens: [ai, audiences, communicating, skill]. DCWF-only: [learning, machine, range, solutions, wide]. WIDAI-only: [building, capability, concept, demonstrations, executive, limitations].
